generation_method: Dynamic enumeration of /api/v1 routes from the mounted FastAPI application and source-module discovery; each route classified by auth_dependency, authorization_dependency, tenant_control_mechanism.
limitations: Public exception routes remain public by design; each public route carries an exception_justification.
WebSocket routes are classified separately in non-http-entrypoints.json.

routes.exception_justification: Credential exchange must be public so anonymous users can obtain a session.
Password reset completion must be public because the one-time reset token is the authorization artifact.
Password reset initiation must be public to prevent account enumeration and support lost-password recovery.
Refresh-token rotation is cookie-based and intentionally callable before access-token auth.
Read-only health probe for the governance evaluation surface.
Shared-document access is token-gated and intentionally public for external recipients.
SSO callback must receive the external provider response before local session issuance.
Router health probe for bootstrap verification.
